mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, toc_user_id, plan_id, order_id, subscription_status, start_at, end_at, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM vip_subscription WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vip_subscription ( tenant_id, toc_user_id, plan_id, order_id, subscription_status, start_at, end_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{tocUserId}, #{planId}, #{orderId}, #{subscriptionStatus}, #{startAt}, #{endAt} )
